title: CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY - 211info
text: OLD MILL CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers counseling services for families and children as well as Intensive Treatment Services (ITS). Referrals to the ITS program generally come via Bento County's Coordinationg team. ITS provides psychiatric day treatment for preschool- and school-aged children with emotional and behavioral challenges and their families. Children enrolled in the ITS program have been unsuccessful at home, typical preschool, child care, and/or public school. 1650 SW 45th Place Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Individual and Family Counseling: Families with children ages 3-18 Intensive Treatment Services: Ages 3-7 with emotional and behavioral challenges and their families Hours: By appointment Email (541) 757-8068 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 757-8068 Main phone Main phone (541) 757-8068 Intake (541) 757-8068 Clinical Support Specialist Hannah Altimus [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment. Referrals will require health insurance information. FEES: Varies by service and insurance plan. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, Linn counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off of SW Country Club Drive between 35th and 53rd Streets. Shares a driveway with Starker Arts and Sunset Parks. Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Psychiatric Day Treatment * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COURT MANDATED CO-PARENTING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RELIEF NURSERY REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - PEDIATRIC OCCUPATIONAL AND PHYSICAL THERAPY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OLD MILL CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES
